purpose: Define the one-shot exportable audit bundle that can be handed to a customer or auditor as a replayable governance evidence package.
hard_rules: Customer-facing audit bundles must be exportable in one shot without manual reconstruction.
Audit bundles must be hash-replayable from immutable refs.
Missing auth, approval, baseline, release, policy, or protocol refs make the bundle invalid.
Compressed or attached export formats are outside v0.7 and must not replace json-bundle.
